title: 🏢 Enterprise Copilot Leading Indicators [Edu]
description: Enterprise-level Copilot leading indicators — PR throughput, adoption metrics, and code volume — aggregated across all organizations.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((pull_requests->>'total_created')::int) AS value FROM copilot_enterprise_daily WHERE day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_enterprise_daily)
SELECT MAX(monthly_active_users) AS value FROM copilot_enterprise_daily WHERE day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_enterprise_daily)
SELECT SUM(loc_suggested_to_add_sum) AS value FROM copilot_enterprise_daily WHERE day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_enterprise_daily)
SELECT SUM(loc_added_sum) AS value FROM copilot_enterprise_daily WHERE day >= (SELECT MAX(day) - INTERVAL '27 days' FROM copilot_enterprise_daily)
